74:
We work the market stalls,♪
And our uniforms are pretty;♪
We are sober men and true,♪
And attentive to our duties!♪

We work the market stalls,♪
And our uniforms are pretty;♪

146:
Here today and gone tomorrow;♪
Yes, I know─♪
That is so!♪

Yes, I know─♪

282:
A simple retainer, lowly born,♪
Unlettered and unknown,♪
Who toils for bread from early morn,♪
Till half the night has flown!♪

A simple retainer, lowly born,♪
Unlettered and unknown,♪
Who toils for bread from early morn,♪
Till half the night has flown!♪

354:
Can I survive this overbearing,♪
Or live a life of mad despairing,♪
My proffered goods despised, rejected?♪
No, no, it's not to be expected!♪

Can I survive this overbearing,♪
Or live a life of mad despairing,♪
My proffered goods despised, rejected?♪
No, no, it's not to be expected!♪

359:
Alright, take yer shite and quit leerin' at me arse.
...What? Ye can't seriously expect me to humor yer fetishes all the time, can ye?

Alright, take yer shite and quit leerin' at me arse.
...What? Ye can't seriously expect me to humor yer fetishes all the time, can ye?

475:
Fair moon, to thee I sing,♪
Bright regent of the heavens,♪
Say, why is everything♪
Either at sixes or at sevens?♪

Fair moon, to thee I sing,♪
Bright regent of the heavens,♪
Say, why is everything♪
Either at sixes or at sevens?♪

547:
I must wander to and fro;♪
But wherever I may go,♪
I shall never be untrue to thee!♪

I must wander to and fro;♪
But wherever I may go,♪
I shall never be untrue to thee!♪

619:
For he himself has said it,♪
And it's greatly to his credit,♪
That he is a retainer!♪
He remains a retainer!♪
